name: Kinea Infra Fundo Investimento Cotas Fundos Investimento Direitos Creditorios Infraestrutura
summary: Kinea Infra Fundo Investimento Cotas Fundos Investimento Direitos Creditorios Infraestrutura is a Brazilian infrastructure investment fund. The fund invests in infrastructure projects in various sectors in Brazil. The fund is based in Brazil.
